mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_like (likeId, boardId, targetType, targetId, createdUser) VALUES (#{likeId}, #{boardId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{createdUser})
mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT('LIKE', LPAD( COALESCE(CAST(SUBSTRING(MAX(likeId), 5) AS UNSIGNED), 0) + 1, 7, '0' )) AS nextLikeId FROM board_like WHERE likeId REGEXP '^LIKE[0-9]+$'
